title: Responsive WordPress Slider Plugin - SlideDeck
desc: Create a WordPress slider with almost anything - posts, pages, custom post types, WooCommerce products, images, and videos. Get SlideDeck for free.
text:
$0.00
Responsive WordPress Slider Plugin
SlideDeck5 is a simple WordPress slider plugin that helps you showcase your images, videos, and posts using beautiful, responsive sliders.
Get SlideDeck5 Now
Save time & Engage Your Visitors
SlideDeck enables you to build stunning content sliders for your WordPress site without any coding. Add images, text and video, embed your own custom HTML, or even dynamically pull content from your favorite sources, like Instagram, YouTube or RSS feeds.
Create A Slider With Almost Anything
With SlideDeck5, you can not only create sliders using WordPress content, but you can also dynamically pull content from external websites.
Image Slider
Video Slider
Post Slider
Testimonial Slider
Product Slider
External Sources
See your existing content in a new light with Lenses
We designed the Lenses in SlideDeck to give your content a beautifully crafted presence. With 18 lenses (and more on the way), SlideDeck gives you tremendous flexibility and power to make your content kick ass.

Checkout All Slidedeck Demos
One content source, many looks
Lenses are highly configurable slider themes that you apply to your content for gorgeous results. Dramatically change the appearance and behavior of your SlideDecks in just a few clicks.
Polarad Lense
O-Town Lens
Half Moon Lens
Transition Pro Lense
Proto Lens
Toolkit Lens
Tailor The Slider To Match Your Website's Style
Customizing SlideDeck5 is easy as breeze. Modify text content, add a custom fonts, change navigation styles, create beautiful transitions and customize all other elements of your slider in an easy to use interface.
Get SlideDeck5 Now
Add The Slider Anywhere On Your WordPress Website
Adding a SlideDeck5 slider to your WordPress website is as easy as inserting a shortcode. Use the WordPress editor buttons to make insert your slider in a post / page, add the shortcode to a page-builder block or even your theme’s template files.
Get SlideDeck5 Now
See Your WordPress Slider Work On All Devices
SlideDeck5 sliders are responsive by design. Whether you build a slider with a custom width or make it full width, your slider will work on mobiles, tablets, desktops and even high resolution devices.
Get SlideDeck5 Now
Built for WordPress. Designed with craft
We think everyone deserves a simple solution to present their content in a beautiful way. SlideDeck 2 is designed to be smarter, more flexible and even prettier than before.
Amazing Manage Screen
Manage all of your SlideDecks at-a-glance
Multitude of Options
Millions of configurations for any style you want
Content Sources Galore
SlideDeck supports a wide range of content sources
Easy-to-Use Settings
It’s easy to configure your SlideDeck
Get SlideDeck5 Now
Get SlideDeck5 Now.
Create sliders and carousels from almost any content on your WordPress website, Youtube channel or social media. Showcase your content with beautiful slider layouts.
